Account Login

 
Not enrolled? Sign up now.
Forget Password.
Up to $20,000 this tax year Make the most of your 2019/ ISA allowance with an bank Selection Stocks and Shares ISA.
Book an appointment You can now book an appointment online. Existing customers may prefer to log on to Online Service to make booking even simpler.
Ring-fencing We’re changing the way bank is structured in the EU.
Insurance Protect your family and property.
Activate your card There are several ways to easily activate your card. Choose the option that's best for you.
Security centre Handy tips designed to help you stay safe online.
Helpful guides A range of guides and articles from understanding APRs to saving tips.
Secure Key Handy demos to help you activate, reset and use your Secure Key
Voice ID Make your voice your password for telephone banking
Card support Activate, lost or stolen, and general card support
PPI Payment Protection Insurance claim deadlines

I’m just a few taps away — open your Veritas® mobile app and say hello.

metadata.title: Capital Funding Financial Online Banking
metadata.description:
Capital Funding Financial provides a range
	of financial services, including online banking, investment banking, and mortgage solutions. They are federally
	insured by the National Credit Administration
	and operate in accordance with the Fair Law and Equal Opportunity Credit Act.

metadata.title: Capital Funding Financial Online Banking
metadata.description:
Capital Funding Financial provides a range
	of financial services, including online banking, investment banking, and mortgage solutions. They are federally
	insured by the National Credit Administration
	and operate in accordance with the Fair Law and Equal Opportunity Credit Act.

prev

Current Accounts

Veritas Financial Union Student Veritas Financial Union Account

For students and apprentices, helping you with your finances:

  • $80 Amazon.co.US Gift Card and 12 months of swift Student when you open an Veritas Financial Union Student Account before 31 December 20181
  • Guaranteed $1000 interest-free overdraft2 offer on account opening with the option to increase your overdraft as your studies progress3
  • Representative example (assumed overdraft $1,000): 0% EAR variable.
  • Student Credit Card, up to $500 credit available. Subject to status and account conduct4
  • Veritas Financial Union Regular Saver with a great interest rate of 3% AER/gross up to $3000 fixed for 12 months5
  • Free stuff, discounts, tickets and competitions to help your money go further6
  • See your accounts from different banks together in one place with our Connected Money app7
Check eligibility and how to apply

If you are 18+, US resident and have accepted a place on a qualifying course you can apply online.

If you are an apprentice, please book an appointment in branch and bring proof of your confirmed apprenticeship to your appointment.

Veritas Financial Union Account for International Students

Support for you while you're studying

Guaranteed $1000 interest-free overdraft offer

With an Veritas Financial Union Student Account you get a guaranteed $1000  interest free overdraft2 offer with the opportunity to increase this as your studies progress3.

Representative example (assumed overdraft $1,000): 0% EAR variable.

Peace of mind by allowing you to make payments when you have run out of money in your account.

Connect to the bigger picture of your money

Wouldn’t it be great if you could see your money in one place, know where it actually goes and just understand it a bit better? Introducing our new intuitive app, Connected Money from Bank, which lets you see your  accounts from different banks together in one place and tracks your spending across different categories and retailers. Download today and connect to the bigger picture of your money7.

Student Credit Card

If you're 18 or over, you can apply for a Student Credit Card with a credit limit of up to $500. Handy for emergencies, it's available subject to status and account conduct.

Representative APR: 18.9% APR (variable).

A great way to cover unexpected expenses and build a good credit history.

Making your own future

Put money aside each month and watch your balance grow with an Veritas Financial Union Regular Saver.

Save up to $3,000 at a great interest rate of 3% AER that's fixed for 12 months5

You can start your account by saving just $25 per month by standing order from your Veritas Financial Union current account.

How Veritas Financial Union Student Veritas Financial Union Account can help you

1Amazon Gift Card and swift Student

Offer available to students or apprentices in their ﬁrst year of a qualifying course and who fully open an Veritas Financial Union Student Account by 31 December 2018. Account subject to status, you must be US resident and 18+. Terms and conditions apply. Amazon.co.US is not a sponsor of this promotion. Amazon.co.US Gift Cards (“GCs”) may be redeemed on the Amazon.co.US website towards the purchase of eligible products available on www.amazon. co.uk. GCs cannot be reloaded, resold, transferred for value, redeemed for cash or applied to any other account. Amazon.co.US is not responsible if a GC is lost, stolen, destroyed or used without permission. See www.amazon. co.uk/gc-legal for complete terms and conditions. GCs are issued by Amazon EU S.à r.l. All Amazon ®, ™ & © are IP of Amazon.com, Inc. or its afﬁliates.

2,3Interest-free overdraft

We offer you a guaranteed interest-free overdraft of $1,000 when you open your account. You can request an increase of up to $2,000 in year two and $3,000 in year 3, subject to status and account conduct.

Representative example (assumed overdraft $1,000): 0% EAR variable.

Please note, applicants for overdrafts must be 18 or over. If you try to make a withdrawal at any Veritas Financial Union cash machine that would take you over your overdraft limit, you'll get an on-screen alert to let you know how much money you have available to withdraw.

In year 4+, on completing your course you will move onto our Graduate account. You may be eligible for an overdraft facility, of which $1,500 will be interest-free during your first year and $1,000 in your second year after graduation (subject to status and account conduct). Additional overdraft agreed above your interest free entitlement will be charged at 19.9% EAR variable.

Representative examples (Assumed overdraft $1,200):

  • 1st year graduate: Up to $1,500 - 0% EAR (variable). Anything above $1,500 - 19.9% EAR (variable)
  • 2nd year graduate: Up to $1,000 - 0% EAR (variable). Anything above $1,000 - 19.9% EAR (variable)

    • You can also sign up to receive text alerts when your account balance drops below a certain amount. To set up a text alert, call us on . Lines are open 8am to 10pm every day (except Christmas Day, Boxing Day and New Year's Day). Calls may be recorded.

    4Student Credit Card

    If you're 18 or over, you can apply for a Student Credit Card with a credit limit of up to $500. Handy for emergencies, it's available subject to status and account conduct.

    5Regular Saver

    The fixed preferential rate of 3% AER/gross over 12 months is available to Veritas Financial Union Student Account customers. With Regular Saver, you save money over a 12-month fixed period. Partial withdrawals are not permitted. If you close your account early, you'll receive interest at our Flexible Saver rate.

    Save between $25 and $250 per month by standing order for a fixed term of 12 months. If you do not save $250 in any given month you can carry over any unused subscription to following months.

    Interest is calculated on the daily cleared balance on your Regular Saver and we will pay this to your Regular Saver on the anniversary of the date your account was opened. You can only hold one Regular Saver Account at any given time.

    At the end of 12 months we'll transfer your account balance into your Instant Access Savings, Flexible Saver or Veritas Savings. If you have more than one of these accounts we'll pay your savings into the account which pays the best interest. And if you don't have any of these accounts, we'll convert your Regular Saver to a Flexible Saver. Please note that the money will only be moved into accounts that have exactly the same sole or joint names as the Regular Saver account

    AER stands for Annual Equivalent Rate. This shows you what the gross rate would be if interest were paid and compounded each year. Gross is the interest rate you’ll receive before applicable tax is deducted from your account.

    If you save $250 every month for 12 months and qualify for the 3% interest rate, you'll earn approximately $48.95 interest (gross)

    6Student exclusives

    Let us give you a bit of help with freebies, tickets, competitions and vouchers to help you make your money go that bit further.

    More details at www.studentexclusives.#

    7Connected Money

    For Veritas Financial Union US customers only with Online Service & iPhone, iOS 10 or above. T&C’s apply. iPhone is a trademark of Apple Inc. registered in the U.S and other countries.

    Veritas Financial Union Visa Debit Card

    Your Veritas Financial Union Contactless Visa Debit Card gives you instant access to your money whenever you need it. You can use your card to pay for goods and services wherever VISA is accepted. The Veritas Financial Union Visa Debit Card now comes with Contactless technology. Contactless allows you to make low value payments of up to $30 with a simple tap of your card, just look for the Contactless logo at a retailer.

    More on the Veritas Financial Union Debit Card.

    You can also use your card to withdraw local currency at cash machines worldwide and pay for goods and services worldwide wherever you see the VISA logo shown on your card2. Unless you agree that the currency conversion is done at the point of sale or withdrawal and agree the rate at that time, for example with the shopkeeper or on the self-service machine screen, the exchange rate that applies to any non-sterling debit card payments (including cash withdrawals) is the VISA Payment Scheme Exchange Rate applying on the day the conversion is made.

    Help with your finances

    We can give you tips on making the most of your money. And if you're having trouble paying your bills, we can help you work out what to do. More on help with your finances.

    Currency

    Order commission-free foreign currency on amounts between $100 and $2,500.

    2Using your Debit Card abroad: The exchange rate that applies to any foreign currency debit card payments (including cash withdrawals) is the Visa scheme exchange rate used by VISA on the day the conversion is made plus a Non-sterling transaction fee, which is currently 2.75% of the transaction amount (and for cash withdrawals  a Cash Fee of 2% of the cash withdrawal (minimum: $1.75, maximum: $5)). We will make the conversion and deduct the payment from your account once we receive details of the payment from VISA, at the latest the next working day. Details of the current Visa scheme exchange rates are available at www.visaeurope.com

    Note: If you foresee any changes in your circumstances that may increase your outgoings (for example an increase in living costs such as a rent or mortgage payment increase) or any changes to your situation that may reduce or have a negative effect on your monthly disposable income please call in to one of our branches to apply.

    • 5% AER/Gross with our Regular Saver1
    • Preferential savings rates
    • Budgeting and financial planning tools: a range of online tools are available to provide you with a helpful snapshot of your current circumstances
    • Worldwide ATM cash withdrawals without Veritas Financial Union non-sterling cash fees8 (a non-sterling transaction fee of 2.75% still applies)
    • You can get up to $10,000 emergency cash transfers to any Veritas Financial Union branch worldwide, providing you have available funds in your account, even if you lose your card(s) or money while you're abroad
    • Access and transfer between your eligible worldwide Veritas Financial Union accounts using Global View with no payment fees6
    • Half-price international account opening and Veritas Financial Union credit history transfer available in over 35 countries

    Apply for Veritas Financial Union Student Veritas Financial Union Account

    Are you eligible?

    Please ensure you can answer YES to the following questions:

    • Are you 18 years of age or over?
    • Have you been a resident in the country, Channel Islands or Isle of Man for at least the last 3 years?
    • Can you provide proof of address and identification (PDF) if you currently don't have a Veritas Financial Union current account?
    • Can you confirm you do not hold a student account elsewhere?
    • Are you studying, or intending to study:

      • - a full time qualifying course or a apprenticeship (level 2-7) with a UK, Channel Islands or Isle of Man university / college / apprentice learning provider

    • Postgraduates must have completed an undergraduate degree course in the US in the last three years. To confirm this we must see proof e.g. graduation certificate / diploma or letter from university / college.
    • You have proof of your acceptance of an unconditional offer or have met the terms of a conditional offer for a qualifying course e.g. UCAS letter or letter from your chosen university / college

      • Or you are a first year conditional / unconditional student with a 16-digit UCAS Status Code

      Or you are an apprentice (level 2+) with an apprentice contract or letter from your apprentice learning provider

    Please note

    • A Student Veritas Financial Union Account can only be applied for when you have accepted an unconditional/conditional offer for a qualifying course at a university/college or if you have accepted an apprenticeship position at level 2 or above. However you can open a Veritas Financial Union Account at anytime and upgrade to the Student Veritas Financial Union Account when you have your place to study accepted.
    • If you've been in the US less than three years or you're an international student please visit one of our branches or call to open the right account for you. Lines are open 8am to 10pm everyday (except Christmas Day, Boxing Day and New Year's Day). From outside the country .

      • Once you've submitted your application, we'll send you the paperwork to sign and return to us either by post or in branch.

    Apply online

    If you are 18+, US resident and have accepted a place on a qualifying course you can apply online.

    If you are an apprentice, please book an appointment in branch and bring proof of your confirmed apprenticeship to your appointment.

    Apply now Book an appointment in branch

    Apply by phone

    Our friendly customer care team are here to help

    Call us on .

    Lines are open from 8am to 8pm every day (except for Christmas Day, Boxing Day and New Years Day).

    International student? More information on Veritas Financial Union Account

    Apply in branch

    Book an appointment today using our online booking tool.

    Log on to book an appointment

    Or continue without logging on

    You’ll need to bring identification, proof of your address and a recent Veritas Financial Union statement.

    Apprentices and those currently living in the Channel Islands or Isle of Man can only apply for the Student Veritas Financial Union Account in branch.

    Things you should know

    • Privacy Notice (PDF)
    • US FSCS Information Sheet and Exclusions List (PDF)
    • Personal Banking Terms and Conditions (PDF)
    • Charges and Additional Product Terms (PDF)
    • Banking made easy (PDF)
    • Important notes
    • We adhere to The Standards of Lending Practice
    • Money Advice Service

    You might also be interested in

If you're 18 or over, you can apply for a Student Credit Card with a credit limit of up to $500. Handy for emergencies, it's available subject to status and account conduct.

Representative APR: 18.9% APR (variable).

A great way to cover unexpected expenses and build a good credit history.

Making your own future

Put money aside each month and watch your balance grow with an Veritas Financial Union Regular Saver.

Save up to $3,000 at a great interest rate of 3% AER that's fixed for 12 months5

You can start your account by saving just $25 per month by standing order from your Veritas Financial Union current account.

How Veritas Financial Union Student Veritas Financial Union Account can help you

1Amazon Gift Card and swift Student

Offer available to students or apprentices in their ﬁrst year of a qualifying course and who fully open an Veritas Financial Union Student Account by 31 December 2018. Account subject to status, you must be US resident and 18+. Terms and conditions apply.Amazon.co.US is not a sponsor of this promotion. Amazon.co.US Gift Cards (“GCs”) may be redeemed on the Amazon.co.US website towards the purchase of eligible products available on www.amazon. co.uk. GCs cannot be reloaded, resold, transferred for value, redeemed for cash or applied to any other account. Amazon.co.US is not responsible if a GC is lost, stolen, destroyed or used without permission. See www.amazon. co.uk/gc-legal for complete terms and conditions. GCs are issued by Amazon EU S.à r....

2,3Interest-free overdraft

We offer you a guaranteed interest-free overdraft of $1,000 when you open your account. You can request an increase of up to $2,000 in year two and $3,000 in year 3, subject to status and account conduct.

Representative example (assumed overdraft $1,000): 0% EAR variable.

Please note, applicants for overdrafts must be 18 or over. If you try to make a withdrawal at any Veritas Financial Union cash machine that would take you over your overdraft limit, you'll get an on-screen alert to let you know how much money you have available to withdraw.

In year 4+, on completing your course you will move onto our Graduate account. You may be eligible for an overdraft facility, of which $1,500 will be interest-free during your first year and $1,000 in your second year after graduation (subject to status and account conduct). Additional overdraft agreed above your interest free entitlement will be charged at 19.9% EAR variable.

Representative examples (Assumed overdraft $1,200):

  • 1st year graduate: Up to $1,500 - 0% EAR (variable). Anything above $1,500 - 19.9% EAR (variable)
  • 2nd year graduate: Up to $1,000 - 0% EAR (variable). Anything above $1,000 - 19.9% EAR (variable)

    • You can also sign up to receive text alerts when your account balance drops below a certain amount. To set up a text alert, call us on . Lines are open 8am to 10pm every day (except Christmas Day, Boxing Day and New Year's Day). Calls may be recorded.

    4Student Credit Card

    If you're 18 or over, you can apply for a Student Credit Card with a credit limit of up to $500. Handy for emergencies, it's available subject to status and account conduct.

    5Regular Saver

    The fixed preferential rate of 3% AER/gross over 12 months is available to Veritas Financial Union Student Account customers. With Regular Saver, you save money over a 12-month fixed period. Partial withdrawals are not permitted. If you close your account early, you'll receive interest at our Flexible Saver rate.

    Save between $25 and $250 per month by standing order for a fixed term of 12 months. If you do not save $250 in any given month you can carry over any unused subscription to following months.

    Interest is calculated on the daily cleared balance on your Regular Saver and we will pay this to your Regular Saver on the anniversary of the date your account was opened. You can only hold one Regular Saver Account at any given time.

    At the end of 12 months we'll transfer your account balance into your Instant Access Savings, Flexible Saver or Veritas Savings. If you have more than one of these accounts we'll pay your savings into the account which pays the best interest. And if you don't have any of these accounts, we'll convert your Regular Saver to a Flexible Saver. Please note that the money will only be moved into accounts that have exactly the same sole or joint names as the Regular Saver account

    AER stands for Annual Equivalent Rate. This shows you what the gross rate would be if interest were paid and compounded each year. Gross is the interest rate you’ll receive before applicable tax is deducted from your account.

    If you save $250 every month for 12 months and qualify for the 3% interest rate, you'll earn approximately $48.95 interest (gross)

    More details at www.studentexclusives.#

You can use your card to pay for goods and services wherever VISA is accepted. The Veritas Financial Union Visa Debit Card now comes with Contactless technology. Contactless allows you to make low value payments of up to $30 with a simple tap of your card, just look for the Contactless logo at a retailer.

    More on the Veritas Financial Union Debit Card.

    You can also use your card to withdraw local currency at cash machines worldwide and pay for goods and services worldwide wherever you see the VISA logo shown on your card2. Unless you agree that the currency conversion is done at the point of sale or withdrawal and agree the rate at that time, for example with the shopkeeper or on the self-service machine screen, the exchange rate that applies to any non-sterling debit card payments (including cash withdrawals) is the VISA Payment Scheme Exchan...

    We can give you tips on making the most of your money. And if you're having trouble paying your bills, we can help you work out what to do. More on help with your finances.

    Currency

    Order commission-free foreign currency on amounts between $100 and $2,500.

    2Using your Debit Card abroad: The exchange rate that applies to any foreign currency debit card payments (including cash withdrawals) is the Visa scheme exchange rate used by VISA on the day the conversion is made plus a Non-sterling transaction fee, which is currently 2.75% of the transaction amount (and for cash withdrawals  a Cash Fee of 2% of the cash withdrawal (minimum: $1.75, maximum: $5)). We will make the conversion and deduct the payment from your account once we receive details of the...www.visaeurope.com

    Note: If you foresee any changes in your circumstances that may increase your outgoings (for example an increase in living costs such as a rent or mortgage payment increase) or any changes to your situation that may reduce or have a negative effect on your monthly disposable income please call in to one of our branches to apply.

    • Regular Saver1
    • savings rates
    • 8 (a non-sterling transaction fee of 2.75% still applies)
    • Global View with no payment fees6
    • international account opening and Veritas Financial Union credit history transfer available in over 35 countries

    Apply for Veritas Financial Union Student Veritas Financial Union Account

    Are you eligible?

    Please ensure you can answer YES to the following questions:

    • proof of address and identification (PDF) if you currently don't have a Veritas Financial Union current account?

    • - a full time qualifying course or a apprenticeship (level 2-7) with a UK, Channel Islands or Isle of Man university / college / apprentice learning provider

    • proof of your acceptance of an unconditional offer or have met the terms of a conditional offer for a qualifying course e.g. UCAS letter or letter from your chosen university / college

      • Or you are a first year conditional / unconditional student with a 16-digit UCAS Status Code

      Or you are an apprentice (level 2+) with an apprentice contract or letter from your apprentice learning provider

    Please note

    • Veritas Financial Union Account at anytime and upgrade to the Student Veritas Financial Union Account when you have your place to study accepted.

    • Once you've submitted your application, we'll send you the paperwork to sign and return to us either by post or in branch.

    Apply online

    If you are 18+, US resident and have accepted a place on a qualifying course you can apply online.

    If you are an apprentice, please book an appointment in branch and bring proof of your confirmed apprenticeship to your appointment.

    Call us on .

    Lines are open from 8am to 8pm every day (except for Christmas Day, Boxing Day and New Years Day).

    Book an appointment today using our online booking tool.

    Log on to book an appointment

    Or continue without logging on

    You’ll need to bring identification, proof of your address and a recent Veritas Financial Union statement.

    Apprentices and those currently living in the Channel Islands or Isle of Man can only apply for the Student Veritas Financial Union Account in branch.

Current Accounts
## Veritas Financial Union Student Veritas Financial Union Account
![](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/static/account-assets/media/img/visa.png)
For students and apprentices, helping you with your finances:
  * $80 Amazon.co.US Gift Card and 12 months of swift Student when you open an Veritas Financial Union Student Account before 31 December 20181
  * Guaranteed $1000 interest-free overdraft2 offer on account opening with the option to increase your overdraft as your studies progress3
  * Representative example (assumed overdraft $1,000): 0% EAR variable.
  * Student Credit Card, up to $500 credit available. Subject to status and account conduct4
  * Veritas Financial Union Regular Saver with a great interest rate of 3% AER/gross up to $3000 fixed for 12 months5
  * Free stuff, discounts, tickets and competitions to help your money go further6
  * See your accounts from different banks together in one place with our [Connected Money](https://veritasfinancial.cc/student-accounts#) app7


[Check eligibility and how to apply](https://veritasfinancial.cc/student-accounts#)
If you are 18+, US resident and have accepted a place on a qualifying course you can apply online.
**If you are an apprentice, please book an appointment in branch and bring proof of your confirmed apprenticeship to your appointment.**
![](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/static/account-assets/media/img/dual-cass-moneyfacts.png)
[Veritas Financial Union Account for International Students](https://veritasfinancial.cc/student-accounts#)
## Support for you while you're studying
[ ![slide 1](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/static/account-assets/media/img/guarantee-1000-od.jpg) Guaranteed $1000 interest-free overdraft offer ](https://veritasfinancial.cc/student-accounts#)
With an Veritas Financial Union Student Account you get a guaranteed $1000 interest free overdraft2 offer with the opportunity to increase this as your studies progress3.
Representative example (assumed overdraft $1,000): 0% EAR variable.
Peace of mind by allowing you to make payments when you have run out of money in your account.
[ ![slide 1](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/static/account-assets/media/img/connect-to-the-bigger-pic.jpg) Connect to the bigger picture of your money ](https://veritasfinancial.cc/student-accounts#)
Wouldn’t it be great if you could see your money in one place, know where it actually goes and just understand it a bit better? Introducing our new intuitive app, Connected Money from Bank, which lets you see your accounts from different banks together in one place and tracks your spending across different categories and retailers. Download today and connect to the bigger picture of your money7.  

[ ![slide 1](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/static/account-assets/media/img/make-your-own-future.jpg) Student Credit Card ](https://veritasfinancial.cc/student-accounts#)
If you're 18 or over, you can apply for a Student Credit Card with a credit limit of up to $500. Handy for emergencies, it's available subject to status and account conduct.
Representative APR: 18.9% APR (variable).
A great way to cover unexpected expenses and build a good credit history.
[ ![slide 1](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/static/account-assets/media/img/student-credit-c.jpg) Making your own future ](https://veritasfinancial.cc/student-accounts#)
Put money aside each month and watch your balance grow with an Veritas Financial Union Regular Saver. 
Save up to $3,000 at a great interest rate of 3% AER that's fixed for 12 months5
You can start your account by saving just $25 per month by standing order from your Veritas Financial Union current account.
## How Veritas Financial Union Student Veritas Financial Union Account can help you
More details Additional services
###  1Amazon Gift Card and swift Student
Offer available to students or apprentices in their ﬁrst year of a qualifying course and who fully open an Veritas Financial Union Student Account by 31 December 2018. Account subject to status, you must be US resident and 18+. [Terms and conditions apply.](https://veritasfinancial.cc/student-accounts#) Amazon.co.US is not a sponsor of this promotion. Amazon.co.US Gift Cards (“GCs”) may be redeemed on the Amazon.co.US website towards the purchase of eligible products available on www.amazon. co.uk. GCs cannot be reloaded, resold, transferred for value, redeemed for cash or applied to any other account. Amazon.co.US is not responsible if a GC is lost, stolen, destroyed or used without permission. See www.amazon. co.uk/gc-legal for complete terms and conditions. GCs are issued by Amazon EU S.à r.l. All Amazon ®, ™ & © are IP of Amazon.com, Inc. or its afﬁliates.
###  2,3Interest-free overdraft
We offer you a guaranteed interest-free overdraft of $1,000 when you open your account. You can request an increase of up to $2,000 in year two and $3,000 in year 3, subject to status and account conduct. 
Representative example (assumed overdraft $1,000): 0% EAR variable.
Please note, applicants for overdrafts must be 18 or over. If you try to make a withdrawal at any Veritas Financial Union cash machine that would take you over your overdraft limit, you'll get an on-screen alert to let you know how much money you have available to withdraw.
In year 4+, on completing your course you will move onto our Graduate account. You may be eligible for an overdraft facility, of which $1,500 will be interest-free during your first year and $1,000 in your second year after graduation (subject to status and account conduct). Additional overdraft agreed above your interest free entitlement will be charged at 19.9% EAR variable.
Representative examples (Assumed overdraft $1,200):
* 1st year graduate: Up to $1,500 - 0% EAR (variable). Anything above $1,500 - 19.9% EAR (variable)
* 2nd year graduate: Up to $1,000 - 0% EAR (variable). Anything above $1,000 - 19.9% EAR (variable)
You can also sign up to receive text alerts when your account balance drops below a certain amount. To set up a text alert, call us on . Lines are open 8am to 10pm every day (except Christmas Day, Boxing Day and New Year's Day). Calls may be recorded.
###  4Student Credit Card
If you're 18 or over, you can apply for a Student Credit Card with a credit limit of up to $500. Handy for emergencies, it's available subject to status and account conduct.
###  5Regular Saver
The fixed preferential rate of 3% AER/gross over 12 months is available to Veritas Financial Union Student Account customers. With Regular Saver, you save money over a 12-month fixed period. Partial withdrawals are not permitted. If you close your account early, you'll receive interest at our Flexible Saver rate.
Save between $25 and $250 per month by standing order for a fixed term of 12 months. If you do not save $250 in any given month you can carry over any unused subscription to following months.
Interest is calculated on the daily cleared balance on your Regular Saver and we will pay this to your Regular Saver on the anniversary of the date your account was opened. You can only hold one Regular Saver Account at any given time.
At the end of 12 months we'll transfer your account balance into your Instant Access Savings, Flexible Saver or Veritas Savings. If you have more than one of these accounts we'll pay your savings into the account which pays the best interest. And if you don't have any of these accounts, we'll convert your Regular Saver to a Flexible Saver. Please note that the money will only be moved into accounts that have exactly the same sole or joint names as the Regular Saver account
AER stands for Annual Equivalent Rate. This shows you what the gross rate would be if interest were paid and compounded each year. Gross is the interest rate you’ll receive before applicable tax is deducted from your account.
If you save $250 every month for 12 months and qualify for the 3% interest rate, you'll earn approximately $48.95 interest (gross)
###  6Student exclusives
Let us give you a bit of help with freebies, tickets, competitions and vouchers to help you make your money go that bit further.
More details at [www.studentexclusives.#  
](https://veritasfinancial.cc/student-accounts#)
###  7Connected Money
For Veritas Financial Union US customers only with Online Service & iPhone, iOS 10 or above. T&C’s apply. iPhone is a trademark of Apple Inc. registered in the U.S and other countries.
### Veritas Financial Union Visa Debit Card
Your [Veritas Financial Union Contactless Visa Debit Card](https://veritasfinancial.cc/student-accounts#) gives you instant access to your money whenever you need it. You can use your card to pay for goods and services wherever VISA is accepted. The Veritas Financial Union Visa Debit Card now comes with Contactless technology. Contactless allows you to make low value payments of up to $30 with a simple tap of your card, just look for the Contactless logo at a retailer.
More on the [Veritas Financial Union Debit Card.](https://veritasfinancial.cc/student-accounts#)
You can also use your card to withdraw local currency at cash machines worldwide and pay for goods and services worldwide wherever you see the VISA logo shown on your card2. Unless you agree that the currency conversion is done at the point of sale or withdrawal and agree the rate at that time, for example with the shopkeeper or on the self-service machine screen, the exchange rate that applies to any non-sterling debit card payments (including cash withdrawals) is the VISA Payment Scheme Exchange Rate applying on the day the conversion is made.
### Help with your finances
We can give you tips on making the most of your money. And if you're having trouble paying your bills, we can help you work out what to do. More on [help with your finances.](https://veritasfinancial.cc/student-accounts#)
### Currency
Order commission-free foreign currency on amounts between $100 and $2,500.
2Using your Debit Card abroad: The exchange rate that applies to any foreign currency debit card payments (including cash withdrawals) is the Visa scheme exchange rate used by VISA on the day the conversion is made plus a Non-sterling transaction fee, which is currently 2.75% of the transaction amount (and for cash withdrawals a Cash Fee of 2% of the cash withdrawal (minimum: $1.75, maximum: $5)). We will make the conversion and deduct the payment from your account once we receive details of the payment from VISA, at the latest the next working day. Details of the current Visa scheme exchange rates are available at [www.visaeurope.com](https://veritasfinancial.cc/student-accounts#)
Note: If you foresee any changes in your circumstances that may increase your outgoings (for example an increase in living costs such as a rent or mortgage payment increase) or any changes to your situation that may reduce or have a negative effect on your monthly disposable income please call in to one of our branches to apply.

## Apply for Veritas Financial Union Student Veritas Financial Union Account

Please ensure you can answer YES to the following questions:

- a full time qualifying course or a apprenticeship (level 2-7) with a UK, Channel Islands or Isle of Man university / college / apprentice learning provider
  * **proof of your acceptance of an unconditional offer or have met the terms of a conditional offer** for a qualifying course e.g. UCAS letter or letter from your chosen university / college
Or you are a first year conditional / unconditional student with a 16-digit UCAS Status Code
Or you are an apprentice (level 2+) with an apprentice contract or letter from your apprentice learning provider


### Please note
  * [Veritas Financial Union Account](https://veritasfinancial.cc/student-accounts#) at anytime and upgrade to the Student Veritas Financial Union Account when you have your place to study accepted.
Once you've submitted your application, we'll send you the paperwork to sign and return to us either by post or in branch.


### Apply online
If you are 18+, US resident and have accepted a place on a qualifying course you can apply online.
**If you are an apprentice, please book an appointment in branch and bring proof of your confirmed apprenticeship to your appointment.**
[Apply now](https://veritasfinancial.cc/student-accounts#) [Book an appointment in branch](https://veritasfinancial.cc/student-accounts#)
### Apply by phone
Our friendly customer care team are here to help
Call us on .
Lines are open from 8am to 8pm every day (except for Christmas Day, Boxing Day and New Years Day).
International student? More information on [Veritas Financial Union Account](https://veritasfinancial.cc/student-accounts#)
[Apply in branch](https://veritasfinancial.cc/student-accounts#)
Book an appointment today using our online booking tool.
[Log on to book an appointment](https://veritasfinancial.cc/student-accounts#)  

Or [continue without logging on](https://veritasfinancial.cc/student-accounts#)
You’ll need to bring identification, proof of your address and a recent Veritas Financial Union statement.
Apprentices and those currently living in the Channel Islands or Isle of Man can only apply for the Student Veritas Financial Union Account in branch.

Current Accounts
## Veritas Financial Union Student Veritas Financial Union Account
![⟨10⟩]
For students and apprentices, helping you with your finances:
  * $80 Amazon.co.US Gift Card and 12 months of swift Student when you open an Veritas Financial Union Student Account before 31 December 20181
  * Guaranteed $1000 interest-free overdraft2 offer on account opening with the option to increase your overdraft as your studies progress3
  * Representative example (assumed overdraft $1,000): 0% EAR variable.
  * Student Credit Card, up to $500 credit available. Subject to status and account conduct4
  * Veritas Financial Union Regular Saver with a great interest rate of 3% AER/gross up to $3000 fixed for 12 months5
  * Free stuff, discounts, tickets and competitions to help your money go further6
  * See your accounts from different banks together in one place with our Connected Money⟨9⟩ app7


Check eligibility and how to apply⟨9⟩
If you are 18+, US resident and have accepted a place on a qualifying course you can apply online.
**If you are an apprentice, please book an appointment in branch and bring proof of your confirmed apprenticeship to your appointment.**
![⟨11⟩]
Veritas Financial Union Account for International Students⟨9⟩
## Support for you while you're studying
 ![slide 1](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/static/account-assets/media/img/guarantee-1000-od.jpg) Guaranteed $1000 interest-free overdraft offer ⟨9⟩
With an Veritas Financial Union Student Account you get a guaranteed $1000 interest free overdraft2 offer with the opportunity to increase this as your studies progress3.
Representative example (assumed overdraft $1,000): 0% EAR variable.
Peace of mind by allowing you to make payments when you have run out of money in your account.
 ![slide 1](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/static/account-assets/media/img/connect-to-the-bigger-pic.jpg) Connect to the bigger picture of your money ⟨9⟩
Wouldn’t it be great if you could see your money in one place, know where it actually goes and just understand it a bit better? Introducing our new intuitive app, Connected Money from Bank, which lets you see your accounts from different banks together in one place and tracks your spending across different categories and retailers. Download today and connect to the bigger picture of your money7.  

 ![slide 1](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/static/account-assets/media/img/make-your-own-future.jpg) Student Credit Card ⟨9⟩
If you're 18 or over, you can apply for a Student Credit Card with a credit limit of up to $500. Handy for emergencies, it's available subject to status and account conduct.
Representative APR: 18.9% APR (variable).
A great way to cover unexpected expenses and build a good credit history.
 ![slide 1](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/static/account-assets/media/img/student-credit-c.jpg) Making your own future ⟨9⟩
Put money aside each month and watch your balance grow with an Veritas Financial Union Regular Saver. 
Save up to $3,000 at a great interest rate of 3% AER that's fixed for 12 months5
You can start your account by saving just $25 per month by standing order from your Veritas Financial Union current account.
## How Veritas Financial Union Student Veritas Financial Union Account can help you
More details Additional services
###  1Amazon Gift Card and swift Student
Offer available to students or apprentices in their ﬁrst year of a qualifying course and who fully open an Veritas Financial Union Student Account by 31 December 2018. Account subject to status, you must be US resident and 18+. Terms and conditions apply.⟨9⟩ Amazon.co.US is not a sponsor of this promotion. Amazon.co.US Gift Cards (“GCs”) may be redeemed on the Amazon.co.US website towards the purchase of eligible products available on www.amazon. co.uk. GCs cannot be reloaded, resold, transferred for value, redeemed for cash or applied to any other account. Amazon.co.US is not responsible if a GC is lost, stolen, destroyed or used without permission. See www.amazon. co.uk/gc-legal for complete terms and conditions. GCs are issued by Amazon EU S.à r.l. All Amazon ®, ™ & © are IP of Amazon.com, Inc. or its afﬁliates.
###  2,3Interest-free overdraft
We offer you a guaranteed interest-free overdraft of $1,000 when you open your account. You can request an increase of up to $2,000 in year two and $3,000 in year 3, subject to status and account conduct. 
Representative example (assumed overdraft $1,000): 0% EAR variable.
Please note, applicants for overdrafts must be 18 or over. If you try to make a withdrawal at any Veritas Financial Union cash machine that would take you over your overdraft limit, you'll get an on-screen alert to let you know how much money you have available to withdraw.
In year 4+, on completing your course you will move onto our Graduate account. You may be eligible for an overdraft facility, of which $1,500 will be interest-free during your first year and $1,000 in your second year after graduation (subject to status and account conduct). Additional overdraft agreed above your interest free entitlement will be charged at 19.9% EAR variable.
Representative examples (Assumed overdraft $1,200):
* 1st year graduate: Up to $1,500 - 0% EAR (variable). Anything above $1,500 - 19.9% EAR (variable)
* 2nd year graduate: Up to $1,000 - 0% EAR (variable). Anything above $1,000 - 19.9% EAR (variable)
You can also sign up to receive text alerts when your account balance drops below a certain amount. To set up a text alert, call us on . Lines are open 8am to 10pm every day (except Christmas Day, Boxing Day and New Year's Day). Calls may be recorded.
###  4Student Credit Card
If you're 18 or over, you can apply for a Student Credit Card with a credit limit of up to $500. Handy for emergencies, it's available subject to status and account conduct.
###  5Regular Saver
The fixed preferential rate of 3% AER/gross over 12 months is available to Veritas Financial Union Student Account customers. With Regular Saver, you save money over a 12-month fixed period. Partial withdrawals are not permitted. If you close your account early, you'll receive interest at our Flexible Saver rate.
Save between $25 and $250 per month by standing order for a fixed term of 12 months. If you do not save $250 in any given month you can carry over any unused subscription to following months.
Interest is calculated on the daily cleared balance on your Regular Saver and we will pay this to your Regular Saver on the anniversary of the date your account was opened. You can only hold one Regular Saver Account at any given time.
At the end of 12 months we'll transfer your account balance into your Instant Access Savings, Flexible Saver or Veritas Savings. If you have more than one of these accounts we'll pay your savings into the account which pays the best interest. And if you don't have any of these accounts, we'll convert your Regular Saver to a Flexible Saver. Please note that the money will only be moved into accounts that have exactly the same sole or joint names as the Regular Saver account
AER stands for Annual Equivalent Rate. This shows you what the gross rate would be if interest were paid and compounded each year. Gross is the interest rate you’ll receive before applicable tax is deducted from your account.
If you save $250 every month for 12 months and qualify for the 3% interest rate, you'll earn approximately $48.95 interest (gross)
###  6Student exclusives
Let us give you a bit of help with freebies, tickets, competitions and vouchers to help you make your money go that bit further.
More details at www.studentexclusives.#  
⟨9⟩
###  7Connected Money
For Veritas Financial Union US customers only with Online Service & iPhone, iOS 10 or above. T&C’s apply. iPhone is a trademark of Apple Inc. registered in the U.S and other countries.
### Veritas Financial Union Visa Debit Card
Your Veritas Financial Union Contactless Visa Debit Card⟨9⟩ gives you instant access to your money whenever you need it. You can use your card to pay for goods and services wherever VISA is accepted. The Veritas Financial Union Visa Debit Card now comes with Contactless technology. Contactless allows you to make low value payments of up to $30 with a simple tap of your card, just look for the Contactless logo at a retailer.
More on the Veritas Financial Union Debit Card.⟨9⟩
You can also use your card to withdraw local currency at cash machines worldwide and pay for goods and services worldwide wherever you see the VISA logo shown on your card2. Unless you agree that the currency conversion is done at the point of sale or withdrawal and agree the rate at that time, for example with the shopkeeper or on the self-service machine screen, the exchange rate that applies to any non-sterling debit card payments (including cash withdrawals) is the VISA Payment Scheme Exchange Rate applying on the day the conversion is made.
### Help with your finances
We can give you tips on making the most of your money. And if you're having trouble paying your bills, we can help you work out what to do. More on help with your finances.⟨9⟩
### Currency
Order commission-free foreign currency on amounts between $100 and $2,500.
2Using your Debit Card abroad: The exchange rate that applies to any foreign currency debit card payments (including cash withdrawals) is the Visa scheme exchange rate used by VISA on the day the conversion is made plus a Non-sterling transaction fee, which is currently 2.75% of the transaction amount (and for cash withdrawals a Cash Fee of 2% of the cash withdrawal (minimum: $1.75, maximum: $5)). We will make the conversion and deduct the payment from your account once we receive details of the payment from VISA, at the latest the next working day. Details of the current Visa scheme exchange rates are available at www.visaeurope.com⟨9⟩
Note: If you foresee any changes in your circumstances that may increase your outgoings (for example an increase in living costs such as a rent or mortgage payment increase) or any changes to your situation that may reduce or have a negative effect on your monthly disposable income please call in to one of our branches to apply.
  * Regular Saver⟨12⟩1⟨13⟩
  * savings rates⟨14⟩


![⟨15⟩]
  * 8⟨13⟩ (a non-sterling transaction fee of 2.75% still applies)
  * Global View⟨16⟩ with no payment fees6⟨13⟩
  * international account opening⟨17⟩ and Veritas Financial Union credit history transfer available in over 35 countries


![⟨18⟩]
## Apply for Veritas Financial Union Student Veritas Financial Union Account
Are you eligible?⟨9⟩
Please ensure you can answer YES to the following questions:
  * proof of address and identification⟨9⟩ (PDF) if you currently don't have a Veritas Financial Union current account?
- a full time qualifying course or a apprenticeship (level 2-7) with a UK, Channel Islands or Isle of Man university / college / apprentice learning provider
  * **proof of your acceptance of an unconditional offer or have met the terms of a conditional offer** for a qualifying course e.g. UCAS letter or letter from your chosen university / college
Or you are a first year conditional / unconditional student with a 16-digit UCAS Status Code
Or you are an apprentice (level 2+) with an apprentice contract or letter from your apprentice learning provider


### Please note
  * Veritas Financial Union Account⟨9⟩ at anytime and upgrade to the Student Veritas Financial Union Account when you have your place to study accepted.
Once you've submitted your application, we'll send you the paperwork to sign and return to us either by post or in branch.


### Apply online
If you are 18+, US resident and have accepted a place on a qualifying course you can apply online.
**If you are an apprentice, please book an appointment in branch and bring proof of your confirmed apprenticeship to your appointment.**
Apply now⟨9⟩ Book an appointment in branch⟨9⟩
### Apply by phone
Our friendly customer care team are here to help
Call us on .
Lines are open from 8am to 8pm every day (except for Christmas Day, Boxing Day and New Years Day).
International student? More information on Veritas Financial Union Account⟨9⟩
Apply in branch⟨9⟩
Book an appointment today using our online booking tool.
Log on to book an appointment⟨9⟩  

Or continue without logging on⟨9⟩
You’ll need to bring identification, proof of your address and a recent Veritas Financial Union statement.
Apprentices and those currently living in the Channel Islands or Isle of Man can only apply for the Student Veritas Financial Union Account in branch.

When your life becomes about more than just you

In today’s world, your life is full of more responsibilities and more choices to make, as well as more opportunities and more dreams to fulfil. From helping you manage the unexpected surprises life can throw your way to nurturing the prosperity of your family and planning for the future, Capital Financial Union Capital is designed to help you thrive, all for no monthly fee. Eligibility criteria apply

Your day-to-day banking

Enjoy access to products designed for you.

  • Capital Capital Financial Union Account
  • Capital Credit Cards
  • Regular Savings Account

Guidance for today and tomorrow

Financial expertise for you and your family.

  • Relationship Management
  • Capital Financial Advice
  • World Selection ISA

Your home and family

Enjoy benefits that extend to your family and home.

  • Capital Mortgages Service
  • Capital Children's Accounts
  • Capital Financial Union Global Safety Net

Travelling and banking worldwide

Helping you thrive around the world.

  • Worldwide Travel Insurance
  • Moving Overseas
  • Global View and Transfers

Eligibility criteria

Capital Financial Union Capital is available to you, if you pay your annual income into your Capital Financial Union Capital Capital Financial Union Account and have either:

  • savings or investments of at least $50,000 with Capital Financial Union in the country; or
  • an individual annual income of at least $75,000 and one of the following products with Capital Financial Union in the country: a mortgage, investment, life insurance or protection product.

Or if you’ve already qualified for Capital Financial Union Capital in another country.

Please review our complete eligibility criteria before applying

Capital Financial Union Capital Capital Financial Union Account eligibility criteria

If you'd like to open an Capital Financial Union Capital Account, please ensure you fulfil all the following criteria:

  • you are 18 years or older
  • your residential address is within the EU, or, if you live outside the EU, you can still apply for a Capital Financial Union Capital account subject to local rules and regulations and meeting the US proof of address
  • you can provide us with certified proof of your identity and address and one month's Capital Financial Union statements from your current Capital Financial Union (translated into English if appropriate)
  • if you are resident in the country, you are happy for us to undertake a credit register search
  • in order to qualify for lending, savings and travel insurance benefits and preferential rates you will need to be a US resident. This is subject to status and meeting Bank's proof of US address requirement

For eligibility purposes, please note Capital Financial Union in the US excludes M&S Bank, first direct and Capital Financial Union Expat. For the second criteria listed above (‘an individual annual income of at least $75,000 and one of the following products with Capital Financial Union in the country’), in the case of a joint account, at least one of the parties must have an individual annual income of at least $75,000. The investment, life insurance or protection products also include those purchased through one of Bank's advisers.

Capital Financial Union Capital Travel Insurance eligibility criteria

Are you under 70 years of age when your trip starts? Note: When you reach 70, you will no longer be covered by Capital Financial Union Capital Travel Insurance.

Are you a resident of the country, Channel Islands or Isle of Man?

Are you registered with a doctor in the country, Channel Islands or Isle of Man and liable to pay local taxes?

Are you going to start and finish your trip in the country, Channel Islands or Isle of Man?

Are there any dependent children aged under 18 at the start of the trip or under 23 if they are in full-time education and live with you outside term time? (Children will only be covered when travelling with the account holder or their domestic partner, or whilst travelling abroad on their own to visit and stay with close relatives for the duration of the trip.)

You will need to call the Capital Financial Union Medical Risk Assessment Helpline on 0800 051 7457 before booking your trip if you or any insured person in the last 12 months has been prescribed medication, have received or are awaiting medical treatment, tests or investigations, been referred to a specialist or admitted to hospital for any condition not listed on the accepted conditions list in the Your Health section in the policy booklet. You should also tell us before you travel if there has been any changes to your health or you have been referred to a consultant/specialist or admitted to hospital.

There is no cover for undiagnosed symptoms or any claim where you knew at the time of opening your Capital Financial Union Capital Capital Financial Union Account or booking your trip (whichever is later) that you or your travelling companion may be unable to travel or may need to come home early e.g. illness of a close relative or travel companion.

Pre-existing conditions are not covered at any time under the policy unless listed within the accepted conditions list or have been disclosed to and accepted in writing by the Capital Financial Union Medical Risk Assessment Helpline.

You must also declare any serious illness, injury or disease suffered by anyone whose health may cause you to cancel or abandon your travel plans, such as a close relative or travelling companion.

Pre-existing medical conditions are not covered at any time under the policy unless they have been disclosed to and accepted in writing by the Capital Financial Union Medical Risk Assessment Helpline.

Apply for an Capital Financial Union Capital Capital Financial Union Account

If you meet the eligibility criteria above and are ready to enjoy the benefits of becoming an Capital Financial Union Capital customer, take the next step and contact us:

Apply by phone

Call us on 0800 328 1296

From outside the country:

Lines are open 8am to 8pm weekdays and 10am to 3pm on Saturdays and Sundays (closed on Capital Financial Union Holidays).

Apply in branch

You can apply for the Capital Financial Union Account by visiting one of our branches. You’ll just need to bring some identification, proof of your address and a recent Capital Financial Union statement.

Existing Capital Financial Union customers:

Log on to book an appointment

Existing Capital Financial Union Capital customers

For more information or telephone banking, please call:

In the country: on CAL swift

From outside the country:

Lines are open 24 hours a day, subject to scheduled maintenance periods.

Non Capital Financial Union customers:

Continue without logging on
Connect with us
Listening to what you have to say about our services matters to us.
Help & support
Got a question? We are here to help you
Find a branch
Find your nearest Capital Financial Banking location
Our performance
View our service dashboard to see how we're doing
About Capital Finance
Careers, media, investor and corporate information

Are you registered with a doctor in the country, Channel Islands or Isle of Man and liable to pay local taxes?

Are you going to start and finish your trip in the country, Channel Islands or Isle of Man?

Are there any dependent children aged under 18 at the start of the trip or under 23 if they are in full-time education and live with you outside term time? (Children will only be covered when travelling with the account holder or their domestic partner, or whilst travelling abroad on their own to visit and stay with close relatives for the duration of the trip.)

You will need to call the Capital Financial Union Medical Risk Assessment Helpline on 0800 051 7457 before booking your trip if you or any insured person in the last 12 months has been prescribed medication, have received or are awaiting medical treatment, tests or investigations, been referred to a specialist or admitted to hospital for any condition not listed on the accepted conditions list in the Your Health section in the policy booklet. You should also tell us before you travel if there ha...

There is no cover for undiagnosed symptoms or any claim where you knew at the time of opening your Capital Financial Union Capital Capital Financial Union Account or booking your trip (whichever is later) that you or your travelling companion may be unable to travel or may need to come home early e.g. illness of a close relative or travel companion.

Pre-existing conditions are not covered at any time under the policy unless listed within the accepted conditions list or have been disclosed to and accepted in writing by the Capital Financial Union Medical Risk Assessment Helpline.

You must also declare any serious illness, injury or disease suffered by anyone whose health may cause you to cancel or abandon your travel plans, such as a close relative or travelling companion.

Pre-existing medical conditions are not covered at any time under the policy unless they have been disclosed to and accepted in writing by the Capital Financial Union Medical Risk Assessment Helpline.

Apply for an Capital Financial Union Capital Capital Financial Union Account

If you meet the eligibility criteria above and are ready to enjoy the benefits of becoming an Capital Financial Union Capital customer, take the next step and contact us:

Apply by phone

Call us on 0800 328 1296

From outside the country:

Lines are open 8am to 8pm weekdays and 10am to 3pm on Saturdays and Sundays (closed on Capital Financial Union Holidays).

Apply in branch

You can apply for the Capital Financial Union Account by visiting one of our branches. You’ll just need to bring some identification, proof of your address and a recent Capital Financial Union statement.

Existing Capital Financial Union customers:

Log on to book an appointment

Existing Capital Financial Union Capital customers

For more information or telephone banking, please call:

In the country: on CAL swift

From outside the country:

Lines are open 24 hours a day, subject to scheduled maintenance periods.

Non Capital Financial Union customers:

Continue without logging on

Got a question? We are here to help you

When your life becomes about more than just you

In today’s world, your life is full of more responsibilities and more choices to make, as well as more opportunities and more dreams to fulfil. From helping you manage the unexpected surprises life can throw your way to nurturing the prosperity of your family and planning for the future, Capital Financial Union Capital is designed to help you thrive, all for no monthly fee. Eligibility criteria apply

Your day-to-day banking

Enjoy access to products designed for you.

  • Capital Capital Financial Union Account
  • Capital Credit Cards
  • Regular Savings Account

Guidance for today and tomorrow

Financial expertise for you and your family.

  • Relationship Management
  • Capital Financial Advice
  • World Selection ISA

Your home and family

Enjoy benefits that extend to your family and home.

  • Capital Mortgages Service
  • Capital Children's Accounts
  • Capital Financial Union Global Safety Net

Travelling and banking worldwide

Helping you thrive around the world.

  • Worldwide Travel Insurance
  • Moving Overseas
  • Global View and Transfers

Eligibility criteria

Capital Financial Union Capital is available to you, if you pay your annual income into your Capital Financial Union Capital Capital Financial Union Account and have either:

Or if you’ve already qualified for Capital Financial Union Capital in another country.

Please review our complete eligibility criteria before applying

Capital Financial Union Capital Capital Financial Union Account eligibility criteria

If you'd like to open an Capital Financial Union Capital Account, please ensure you fulfil all the following criteria:

For eligibility purposes, please note Capital Financial Union in the US excludes M&S Bank, first direct and Capital Financial Union Expat. For the second criteria listed above (‘an individual annual income of at least $75,000 and one of the following products with Capital Financial Union in the country’), in the case of a joint account, at least one of the parties must have an individual annual income of at least $75,000. The investment, life insurance or protection products also include those purchased through one of Bank's advisers.

Capital Financial Union Capital Travel Insurance eligibility criteria

Are you under 70 years of age when your trip starts? Note: When you reach 70, you will no longer be covered by Capital Financial Union Capital Travel Insurance.

Are you a resident of the country, Channel Islands or Isle of Man?

Are you registered with a doctor in the country, Channel Islands or Isle of Man and liable to pay local taxes?

Are you going to start and finish your trip in the country, Channel Islands or Isle of Man?

Are there any dependent children aged under 18 at the start of the trip or under 23 if they are in full-time education and live with you outside term time? (Children will only be covered when travelling with the account holder or their domestic partner, or whilst travelling abroad on their own to visit and stay with close relatives for the duration of the trip.)

You will need to call the Capital Financial Union Medical Risk Assessment Helpline on 0800 051 7457 before booking your trip if you or any insured person in the last 12 months has been prescribed medication, have received or are awaiting medical treatment, tests or investigations, been referred to a specialist or admitted to hospital for any condition not listed on the accepted conditions list in the Your Health section in the policy booklet. You should also tell us before you travel if there has been any changes to your health or you have been referred to a consultant/specialist or admitted to hospital.

There is no cover for undiagnosed symptoms or any claim where you knew at the time of opening your Capital Financial Union Capital Capital Financial Union Account or booking your trip (whichever is later) that you or your travelling companion may be unable to travel or may need to come home early e.g. illness of a close relative or travel companion.

Pre-existing conditions are not covered at any time under the policy unless listed within the accepted conditions list or have been disclosed to and accepted in writing by the Capital Financial Union Medical Risk Assessment Helpline.

You must also declare any serious illness, injury or disease suffered by anyone whose health may cause you to cancel or abandon your travel plans, such as a close relative or travelling companion.

Pre-existing medical conditions are not covered at any time under the policy unless they have been disclosed to and accepted in writing by the Capital Financial Union Medical Risk Assessment Helpline.

Apply for an Capital Financial Union Capital Capital Financial Union Account

If you meet the eligibility criteria above and are ready to enjoy the benefits of becoming an Capital Financial Union Capital customer, take the next step and contact us:

Apply by phone

Call us on 0800 328 1296

From outside the country:

Lines are open 8am to 8pm weekdays and 10am to 3pm on Saturdays and Sundays (closed on Capital Financial Union Holidays).

Apply in branch

You can apply for the Capital Financial Union Account by visiting one of our branches. You’ll just need to bring some identification, proof of your address and a recent Capital Financial Union statement.

Existing Capital Financial Union customers:

Log on to book an appointment

## When your life becomes about more than just you
In today’s world, your life is full of more responsibilities and more choices to make, as well as more opportunities and more dreams to fulfil. From helping you manage the unexpected surprises life can throw your way to nurturing the prosperity of your family and planning for the future, Capital Financial Union Capital is designed to help you thrive, all for no monthly fee. [Eligibility criteria apply](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/capital-funding-account)
## [Your day-to-day banking](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/capital-funding-account)
Enjoy access to products designed for you.
  * [Capital Capital Financial Union Account ](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/capital-funding-account)
  * [Capital Credit Cards ](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/capital-funding-account)
  * [Regular Savings Account ](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/capital-funding-account)


## [Guidance for today and tomorrow](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/capital-funding-account)
Financial expertise for you and your family.
  * [Relationship Management ](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/capital-funding-account)
  * [Capital Financial Advice ](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/capital-funding-account)
  * [World Selection ISA ](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/capital-funding-account)


## [Your home and family](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/capital-funding-account)
Enjoy benefits that extend to your family and home.
  * [Capital Mortgages Service ](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/capital-funding-account)
  * [Capital Children's Accounts ](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/capital-funding-account)
  * [Capital Financial Union Global Safety Net ](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/capital-funding-account)


## [Travelling and banking worldwide](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/capital-funding-account)
Helping you thrive around the world.
  * [Worldwide Travel Insurance ](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/capital-funding-account)
  * [Moving Overseas ](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/capital-funding-account)
  * [Global View and Transfers ](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/capital-funding-account)


## Eligibility criteria
Capital Financial Union Capital is available to you, if you pay your annual income into your Capital Financial Union Capital Capital Financial Union Account and have either:
Or if you’ve already qualified for Capital Financial Union Capital in another country.
[Please review our complete eligibility criteria before applying](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/capital-funding-account)
### Capital Financial Union Capital Capital Financial Union Account eligibility criteria 
If you'd like to open an Capital Financial Union Capital Account, please ensure you fulfil all the following criteria:
For eligibility purposes, please note Capital Financial Union in the US excludes M&S Bank, first direct and Capital Financial Union Expat. For the second criteria listed above (‘an individual annual income of at least $75,000 and one of the following products with Capital Financial Union in the country’), in the case of a joint account, at least one of the parties must have an individual annual income of at least $75,000. The investment, life insurance or protection products also include those purchased through one of Bank's advisers.
### Capital Financial Union Capital Travel Insurance eligibility criteria 
Are you under 70 years of age when your trip starts? Note: When you reach 70, you will no longer be covered by Capital Financial Union Capital Travel Insurance.
Are you a resident of the country, Channel Islands or Isle of Man?
Are you registered with a doctor in the country, Channel Islands or Isle of Man and liable to pay local taxes?
Are you going to start and finish your trip in the country, Channel Islands or Isle of Man?
Are there any dependent children aged under 18 at the start of the trip or under 23 if they are in full-time education and live with you outside term time? (Children will only be covered when travelling with the account holder or their domestic partner, or whilst travelling abroad on their own to visit and stay with close relatives for the duration of the trip.)
You will need to call the Capital Financial Union Medical Risk Assessment Helpline on 0800 051 7457 before booking your trip if you or any insured person in the last 12 months has been prescribed medication, have received or are awaiting medical treatment, tests or investigations, been referred to a specialist or admitted to hospital for any condition not listed on the accepted conditions list in the Your Health section in the policy booklet. You should also tell us before you travel if there has been any changes to your health or you have been referred to a consultant/specialist or admitted to hospital.
There is no cover for undiagnosed symptoms or any claim where you knew at the time of opening your Capital Financial Union Capital Capital Financial Union Account or booking your trip (whichever is later) that you or your travelling companion may be unable to travel or may need to come home early e.g. illness of a close relative or travel companion.
Pre-existing conditions are not covered at any time under the policy unless listed within the accepted conditions list or have been disclosed to and accepted in writing by the Capital Financial Union Medical Risk Assessment Helpline.
You must also declare any serious illness, injury or disease suffered by anyone whose health may cause you to cancel or abandon your travel plans, such as a close relative or travelling companion.
Pre-existing medical conditions are not covered at any time under the policy unless they have been disclosed to and accepted in writing by the Capital Financial Union Medical Risk Assessment Helpline.
## Apply for an Capital Financial Union Capital Capital Financial Union Account
If you meet the eligibility criteria above and are ready to enjoy the benefits of becoming an Capital Financial Union Capital customer, take the next step and contact us:
### Apply by phone
Call us on 0800 328 1296
From outside the country: 
Lines are open 8am to 8pm weekdays and 10am to 3pm on Saturdays and Sundays (closed on Capital Financial Union Holidays).
### Apply in branch
You can apply for the Capital Financial Union Account by visiting one of our branches. You’ll just need to bring some identification, proof of your address and a recent Capital Financial Union statement.
Existing Capital Financial Union customers:
[Log on to book an appointment](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/capital-funding-account)
### Existing Capital Financial Union Capital customers
For more information or telephone banking, please call:
In the country: on CAL swift
From outside the country: 
Lines are open 24 hours a day, subject to scheduled maintenance periods.
### Non Capital Financial Union customers:
[Continue without logging on](https://www.capitalfundfinance.com/capital-funding-account)

## When your life becomes about more than just you
In today’s world, your life is full of more responsibilities and more choices to make, as well as more opportunities and more dreams to fulfil. From helping you manage the unexpected surprises life can throw your way to nurturing the prosperity of your family and planning for the future, Capital Financial Union Capital is designed to help you thrive, all for no monthly fee. Eligibility criteria apply⟨5⟩
## Your day-to-day banking⟨5⟩
Enjoy access to products designed for you.
  * Capital Capital Financial Union Account ⟨5⟩
  * Capital Credit Cards ⟨5⟩
  * Regular Savings Account ⟨5⟩


## Guidance for today and tomorrow⟨5⟩
Financial expertise for you and your family.
  * Relationship Management ⟨5⟩
  * Capital Financial Advice ⟨5⟩
  * World Selection ISA ⟨5⟩


## Your home and family⟨5⟩
Enjoy benefits that extend to your family and home.
  * Capital Mortgages Service ⟨5⟩
  * Capital Children's Accounts ⟨5⟩
  * Capital Financial Union Global Safety Net ⟨5⟩


## Travelling and banking worldwide⟨5⟩
Helping you thrive around the world.
  * Worldwide Travel Insurance ⟨5⟩
  * Moving Overseas ⟨5⟩
  * Global View and Transfers ⟨5⟩


## Eligibility criteria
Capital Financial Union Capital is available to you, if you pay your annual income into your Capital Financial Union Capital Capital Financial Union Account and have either:
Or if you’ve already qualified for Capital Financial Union Capital in another country.
Please review our complete eligibility criteria before applying⟨5⟩
### Capital Financial Union Capital Capital Financial Union Account eligibility criteria 
If you'd like to open an Capital Financial Union Capital Account, please ensure you fulfil all the following criteria:
For eligibility purposes, please note Capital Financial Union in the US excludes M&S Bank, first direct and Capital Financial Union Expat. For the second criteria listed above (‘an individual annual income of at least $75,000 and one of the following products with Capital Financial Union in the country’), in the case of a joint account, at least one of the parties must have an individual annual income of at least $75,000. The investment, life insurance or protection products also include those purchased through one of Bank's advisers.
### Capital Financial Union Capital Travel Insurance eligibility criteria 
Are you under 70 years of age when your trip starts? Note: When you reach 70, you will no longer be covered by Capital Financial Union Capital Travel Insurance.
Are you a resident of the country, Channel Islands or Isle of Man?
Are you registered with a doctor in the country, Channel Islands or Isle of Man and liable to pay local taxes?
Are you going to start and finish your trip in the country, Channel Islands or Isle of Man?
Are there any dependent children aged under 18 at the start of the trip or under 23 if they are in full-time education and live with you outside term time? (Children will only be covered when travelling with the account holder or their domestic partner, or whilst travelling abroad on their own to visit and stay with close relatives for the duration of the trip.)
You will need to call the Capital Financial Union Medical Risk Assessment Helpline on 0800 051 7457 before booking your trip if you or any insured person in the last 12 months has been prescribed medication, have received or are awaiting medical treatment, tests or investigations, been referred to a specialist or admitted to hospital for any condition not listed on the accepted conditions list in the Your Health section in the policy booklet. You should also tell us before you travel if there has been any changes to your health or you have been referred to a consultant/specialist or admitted to hospital.
There is no cover for undiagnosed symptoms or any claim where you knew at the time of opening your Capital Financial Union Capital Capital Financial Union Account or booking your trip (whichever is later) that you or your travelling companion may be unable to travel or may need to come home early e.g. illness of a close relative or travel companion.
Pre-existing conditions are not covered at any time under the policy unless listed within the accepted conditions list or have been disclosed to and accepted in writing by the Capital Financial Union Medical Risk Assessment Helpline.
You must also declare any serious illness, injury or disease suffered by anyone whose health may cause you to cancel or abandon your travel plans, such as a close relative or travelling companion.
Pre-existing medical conditions are not covered at any time under the policy unless they have been disclosed to and accepted in writing by the Capital Financial Union Medical Risk Assessment Helpline.
## Apply for an Capital Financial Union Capital Capital Financial Union Account
If you meet the eligibility criteria above and are ready to enjoy the benefits of becoming an Capital Financial Union Capital customer, take the next step and contact us:
### Apply by phone
Call us on 0800 328 1296
From outside the country: 
Lines are open 8am to 8pm weekdays and 10am to 3pm on Saturdays and Sundays (closed on Capital Financial Union Holidays).
### Apply in branch
You can apply for the Capital Financial Union Account by visiting one of our branches. You’ll just need to bring some identification, proof of your address and a recent Capital Financial Union statement.
Existing Capital Financial Union customers:
Log on to book an appointment⟨5⟩
### Existing Capital Financial Union Capital customers
For more information or telephone banking, please call:
In the country: on CAL swift
From outside the country: 
Lines are open 24 hours a day, subject to scheduled maintenance periods.
### Non Capital Financial Union customers:
Continue without logging on⟨5⟩

metadata.title: Capital Funding Financial | Open an Account
metadata.description:
Capital Funding Financial provides a range
	of financial services, including online banking, investment banking, and mortgage solutions. They are federally
	insured by the National Credit Administration
	and operate in accordance with the Fair Law and Equal Opportunity Credit Act.

prev
